member.name: T:nxm.data.core.access.caching_data_reader
member.summary: data reader using "local" cache for "downloaded" streams

member.name: F:nxm.data.core.access.caching_data_reader.m_arrPartitionPrefix
member.summary: prefix for accessing shared cache-data-stream-service - each caching reader works in separate "partition"

member.name: T:nxm.stream.core.extension_services_provider
member.summary: nxm.messages.core extension services provider - each method returns specific service type

member.name: M:nxm.stream.services.dscp_on_files.create_ident(System.String)
member.summary: creates SID (stream ident) with appended extension ie. LOCAL32434309423.txt

member.name: M:nxm.stream.services.dscp_on_files.read_chunk(System.String,System.Int64,System.Int32,System.Boolean)
member.summary: read resource content chunk at given location

member.name: M:nxm.stream.services.dscp_on_files.write_chunk(System.String,System.Int64,System.Int32,System.Byte[],System.Byte[])
member.summary: write resource content chunk at given location

member.name: M:nxm.stream.services.dspp_on_files.initialize(nxm.system.execution.context.icall_context,System.String)
member.summary: create instance and initialize to be ready to work

member.name: M:nxm.stream.services.dspp_on_files.begin_create(nxm.system.execution.context.icall_context,nxm.stream.types.data_stream_properties,System.TimeSpan)
member.summary: add entry (registers resource) to be managed by stream property service

member.name: M:nxm.stream.services.dspp_on_files.get_due_uncommited
member.summary: returns uncommited items' monikers which exceed commit-due-time

member.name: M:nxm.stream.services.dspp_on_files._try_get_entry_by_id(System.String)
member.summary: try get entry for given entry-id

member.name: M:nxm.stream.services.dspp_on_files._load_rewrite_entries(nxm.system.execution.context.icall_context,nxm.stream.services.dspp_on_files._directory_,System.Boolean)
member.summary: rewrite all entries delegate should return _result_.OK with new entry value to update/save intact or null to delete used during 'cleaning' operation

member.name: F:nxm.stream.services.dspp_on_files.m_oExclusiveLock
member.summary: exclusive, reentrant lock for this service

member.name: M:nxm.stream.services.data_stream_service.read_chunk(System.String,System.Int64,System.Int32,System.Boolean)
member.summary: read resource content chunk at given location

member.name: M:nxm.stream.services.data_stream_service.write_chunk(nxm.system.execution.context.icall_context,System.String,System.Int64,System.Int32,System.Byte[],System.Byte[])
member.summary: write resource content chunk at given location

member.summary: create stream-entry in DSS and upload given input-stream

member.summary: create stream-entry in DSS and call delegate to populate stream

member.name: T:nxm.stream.services.temp_data_stream_service
member.summary: data stream service for temporary files

member.summary: create stream-entry in DSS and upload given input-stream

member.summary: read resource content chunk at given location

member.summary: write resource content chunk at given location

member.name: M:nxm.stream.types.idata_stream_property_provider.begin_create(nxm.system.execution.context.icall_context,nxm.stream.types.data_stream_properties,System.TimeSpan)
member.summary: add entry (registers resource) to be managed by stream property service

member.name: M:nxm.stream.types.idata_stream_property_provider.begin_update(nxm.system.execution.context.icall_context,nxm.stream.types.data_stream_properties,System.TimeSpan)
member.summary: notify of begin of update content operation store new moniker and mark resource as expirable only id, moniker, expires properties are processed

member.name: M:nxm.stream.types.idata_stream_property_provider.end_change(nxm.system.execution.context.icall_context,System.String,System.Boolean,nxm.stream.types.data_stream_properties,System.Int32)
member.summary: notify of end of update/create operation

member.name: M:nxm.stream.types.idata_stream_property_provider.get_due_uncommited
member.summary: returns uncommited items' monikers which exceed commit-due-time

member.summary: read resource content chunk at given location

member.name: M:nxm.stream.types.idata_stream_service.write_chunk(nxm.system.execution.context.icall_context,System.String,System.Int64,System.Int32,System.Byte[],System.Byte[])
member.summary: write resource content chunk at given location

member.name: M:nxm.stream.types.idata_stream_service.open_for_reading(System.String,System.Int32)
member.summary: one step operation returning opened stream for reading with optionally returned properties

member.name: M:nxm.stream.types.idata_stream_service_Extensions.copy_to_local_file(nxm.stream.types.idata_stream_service,nxm.system.execution.context.icall_context,System.String,System.String,System.Boolean,nxm.system.execution.cancellation)
member.summary: copy given stream stored in DSS to given local file optionally removing it from DSS ( = move_to_local_file)

member.name: T:nxm.stream.types.data_stream_properties
member.summary: complete set of data stream properties. can be used selectively, with use validity flags

member.name: P:nxm.stream.types.data_stream_properties.id
member.summary: data stream ID unique inside provider [need flag:CORE]

member.name: P:nxm.stream.types.data_stream_properties.expires
member.summary: when resource expires and can be automatically deleted [need flag:CORE]

member.name: P:nxm.stream.types.data_stream_properties.is_stream_owner
member.summary: is stream owned by us ? (should be deleted when deleting)

member.name: P:nxm.stream.types.data_stream_properties.uploaded_length
member.summary: uploaded available length (used restartable partial upload)

member.name: M:nxm.stream.types.data_stream_properties_builder.pdf(System.String,System.String,System.Int64,System.DateTime)
member.summary: compose data stream properties for PDF file

member.name: M:nxm.stream.types.data_stream_properties_builder.xml(System.String,System.String,System.Int64,System.DateTime)
member.summary: compose data stream properties for XML file

member.name: M:nxm.stream.types.data_stream_properties_builder.html(System.String,System.String,System.Int64,System.DateTime)
member.summary: compose data stream properties for HTML file

member.name: T:nxm.stream.types.stream_library_moniker
member.summary: holds extended 'reference-info' for data-stream in stream-library

member.name: T:nxm.stream.types.stream_library_properties
member.summary: "stream library" properties (meta data about relations between streams)

member.name: P:nxm.stream.types.stream_library_properties.meaning
member.summary: meaning - logical stream type (semantic meaning) i.e. agreement, cv, photo etc.

member.name: P:nxm.stream.types.stream_library_properties.attachments
member.summary: attachments - resources owned by this item will be deleted when deleting this

member.name: P:nxm.stream.types.stream_library_properties.links
member.summary: links - resources not owned by this item but related by 'role' property
